title: Xodus Secures Western Australia Site for Major Green Hydrogen Project
content: Xodus is developing a major green hydrogen and ammonia production hub on a 16,000-hectare site in Oakajee, Western Australia. The project will unfold in two phases â€” first supplying hydrogen for local industries like mining and transport, then producing ammonia for export to Japan and South Korea. Backed by the state government, the facility aligns with Australiaâ€™s National Hydrogen Strategy and will likely draw renewable power from the Warradarge Wind Farm.
author: Analysts Account
